tasks.subject: Task 0: Errors + config surface
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BSACompileFailed/FlashVSRWeightsIncomplete/UnsupportedGpuArch + FlashVSREngineConfig + UpscaleConfig.flashvsr + cfg-time rejects + capability_key threads precision.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/core/errors.py, src/kinoforge/core/config.py, tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py -v → 8 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 exceptions importable", "FlashVSREngineConfig validates", "UpscaleConfig.flashvsr wired", "capability_key populates"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: _fetch_weights CLI + manifest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pod-safe CLI fetches FlashVSR bundle from HF + SHA256-verifies against shipped weights_manifest.json.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_fetch_weights.py, weights_manifest.json, __init__.py (placeholder), tests/.../test_fetch_weights.py, pyproject.toml

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_fetch_weights.py -v → 6 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_fetch_weights.py", "src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/weights_manifest.json", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_fetch_weights.py", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_fetch_weights.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLI shape", "lite=2 full=4 files", "SHA mismatch raises", "pod-safe imports", "manifest packaged"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

**Files:** tests/live/test_flashvsr_live.py (un-xfail F-multi + F-warm), tests/live/evidence/2026-07-01_flashvsr_f_multi_warm_stdout.txt
